Sci-Fi Technology.feature_description: You'll always have someone to talk to on every drive. Alexa an intelligent companion that responds intuitively to your voice.
A powerhouse of uninterrupted excitement with a dual HD Superscreen that packs a 26.03 cm (10.25 inch) infotainment and a 26.03 cm (10.25 inch) digital cluster.
Developed in partnership with Sony Corporation Japan, this immersive first-in-class 12 speaker and 3D sound system is designed to take your listening experience to a whole new level.
A 360 view of your adventures with advanced wide-angle cameras that record continuously so you never miss those adrenaline-fuelled moments.

Spirited Performance.feature_description: Most powerful engines of their class that guarantee an unparalleled rush every single time. Now, go from 0-60 km/h in under 5 seconds.
Ever thought that parking would have its own conveniences? rnThe XUV700 comes with a control switch that enables static and dynamic apply and release.
Choose your rush with intuitive technology that lets you Zip, Zap, Zoom, or customise your drive mode.

Unmissable Presence.feature_description: First-in-class, flush-fitted door handles that reach out to you.
An uninterrupted view of the sky, now with India's first Alexa-enabled panoramic sunroof.
Announce your arrival in style with striking headlamps and LED DRLs
Distinctive Diamond Cut Alloy Wheels that ensure a bold SUV stance, even at a standstill.
A combination of comfort and sophistaction with premium leatherette contoured seats with solid bolsters.
Rest assured, literally. An intuitive set of buttons that lets you access the infotainment without having to move your arm from the armrest.

sub_features.feature_description: An intelligent SUV with intelligent speed.rnAdvanced driver assist system that adapts your speed to the vehicles around you.
An intelligent system that keeps you in the centre of the lane and makes you the centre of everyone's attention as well.
Intelligence that alerts you in case your vehicle begins to move out of its lane.
You may miss out on a road-sign or two, but your SUV won't!
The XUV700 never takes a break from protecting you. The SUV is equipped with an intelligent system that applies brakes automatically if you don't react on time to avoid collision.
Blind them with your adventure, not your headlights. rnThe XUV700 temporarily switches its headlights to low-beam, in case of oncoming traffic.
The XUV700 can sense a sudden obstacle before you do and intimates you to act by sending an alert.
We got a pilot to assist you! The Advanced Driver Assistance employs a virtual smart pilot to take charge of steering, acceleration, and braking within its lane.

World Class Safety.feature_description: While you live the rush, the XUV700 handles your safety for you, with best-in-class 7 Airbags.
Ensures a stable drive to help you push your limits on every adventure.
If the adrenaline rush doesn't keep you awake, the vibration alert on your steering wheel sure will.

sub_features.feature_description: An intelligent SUV with intelligent speed.rnAdvanced driver assist system that adapts your speed to the vehicles around you.
An intelligent system that keeps you in the centre of the lane and makes you the centre of everyone's attention as well.
Intelligence that alerts you in case your vehicle begins to move out of its lane.
You may miss out on a road-sign or two, but your SUV won't!
The XUV700 never takes a break from protecting you. The SUV is equipped with an intelligent system that applies brakes automatically if you don't react on time to avoid collision.
Blind them with your adventure, not your headlights. rnThe XUV700 temporarily switches its headlights to low-beam, in case of oncoming traffic.
The XUV700 can sense a sudden obstacle before you do and intimates you to act by sending an alert.
We got a pilot to assist you! The Advanced Driver Assistance employs a virtual smart pilot to take charge of steering, acceleration, and braking within its lane.

World Class Safety.feature_description: Ensures a stable drive to help you push your limits on every adventure.
If the adrenaline rush doesn't keep you awake, the vibration alert on your steering wheel sure will.
